prompt: Commit these changes - I modified the Header navigation links

assertions.name: bilingual-format
assertions.description: Commit message has English Conventional Commits title and Chinese body
assertions.check: Title is English (type: description), body is Traditional Chinese

assertions.name: correct-type
assertions.description: Correctly categorizes change type (feat for new feature)

assertions.name: meaningful-body
assertions.description: Body explains changes in Traditional Chinese
assertions.check: Body contains Chinese description related to Projects link
